issue.title: [bug]: missing disabled style for Accordion with base-ui
issue.body: ### Describe the bug Using the `` with "base-ui" and the `disabled` props on `` doesn't apply style for the trigger/button. It's because actually the classes on `` are `disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50` but base-ui only apply an `aria-disabled` attribute (not directly the `disabled` attr on the button). The solution is to also add `aria-disabled:pointer-events-none aria-disabled:opacity-50` on the style on `` ### Affected component/components Accordion ### How to reproduce Example from create with radix: https://ui.shadcn.com/create?item=accordion-example&iconLibrary=hugeicons&font=geist Example from create with base: https://ui.shadcn.com/create?item=accordion-example&iconLibrary=hugeicons&font=geist&base=base ### Codesandbox/StackBlitz link _No response_ ### Logs ```bash ``` ### System Info ```bash System: OS: macOS 15.5 CPU: (14) arm64 Apple M4 Pro Memory: 178.59 MB / 24.00 GB Shell: 5.9 - /bin/zsh Binaries: Node: 22.14.0 - /Users/xxxxx/.volta/tools/image/node/22.14.0/bin/node npm: 10.9.2 - /Users/xxxxx/.volta/tools/image/node/22.14.0/bin/npm Browsers: Chrome: 145.0.7632.76 Firefox: 147.0 Firefox Developer Edition: 148.0 ``` ### Before submitting - [x] I've made research efforts and searched the documentation - [x] I've searched for existing issues
